metadata.title: Greek Essence | Thoughtful journeys through Greece
metadata.description: Discover a more personal way to explore Greece, shaped around place, pace, and meaningful local moments.

hero.title: Greece, experienced with intention
hero.summary: Slow down, look closer, and discover an island journey shaped around the way you want to travel.

promise.heading: More than a list of places
body: Greek Essence brings together considered routes, a feeling for place, and room to travel at your own rhythm.
Every journey begins with what matters to you, not with a fixed package.

parosFeature.title: Paros & Antiparos
parosFeature.summary: Whitewashed villages, clear coves, generous tables, and two islands with distinct but complementary rhythms.

steps.title: Share your ideas
steps.summary: Tell us where your curiosity leads and how you like to travel.

steps.title: Shape the journey
steps.summary: Your interests become the starting point for a thoughtful route.

steps.title: Travel with clarity
steps.summary: Review a coherent plan designed around your pace and priorities.

trustStory.heading: A closer relationship with Greece
body: We believe the most memorable journeys leave space for character: a quiet harbour, an unhurried meal, a conversation that changes the day.
Our role is to connect those moments into a journey that feels considered and genuinely yours.
